  • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

    Pisa tend to build through midfield and work the ball into wide areas, but they don’t always turn that into a lot of clear chances. Juventus usually keep the ball and move it through short passes, trying to find space between the lines before getting runners in behind the defence. It feels like Pisa will focus on structured build‑up, while Juventus look to move the ball quickly and create openings through combinations.
